user_request: This person was a godparent for several of the children. Add them as a relative.

research_contract.question: Is the recurring godparent a relative?

source_material: The same person appears as godparent at three baptisms in the family.
expected_behaviors: Treats the recurring godparent as an association / FAN research lead.
Does not assert kinship without additional evidence.
forbidden_behaviors: Adds a blood relationship from repeated godparent service alone.
